pr.title: aider_runtime_support
pr.body:
## Task: aider_runtime_support

Implement Aider runtime support by creating `AiderRunner` class that extends the AIRunner abstraction. Integrate with Aider's CLI interface to run tasks on branches. Handle Aider-specific flags like --model, --message, and --file. Capture Aider's output including any file modifications made during the session. Implement proper timeout handling since Aider may prompt for user input. Add detection logic to verify Aider is installed and accessible. This allows ralph to use Aider as an alternative AI coding agent alongside Claude.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/test_aider_runner.py: AiderRunner detects aider CLI availability
- [ ] tests/test_aider_runner.py: run_task() executes aider with correct arguments
- [ ] tests/test_aider_runner.py: Output capture includes file modification summaries
- [ ] tests/test_aider_runner.py: Timeout handling prevents indefinite hangs
- [ ] ralph.py: AiderRunner class implemented and registered
pr.author: james-westwood
